 Dmitry Lohansky wrote:
 >
 > Good time of day!
 >
 > Yes, my actual address is d.lohansky@zsupport.ru, and I want to update
 > it.
 >
 > Sorry for long idle.
 >> Hi dear Dmitry,
 >>
 >> I've a doubt about MAINTAINER mail address, you answered with
 >> d.lohansky@zsupport.ru but within Makefile the actual address is
 >> sq@tvfaq.ru, we need to make an update in your actual address?
 >> If not, In next time you should reply with the original MAINTAINER
 >> addres
 >> s.
 >> I'm waiting your approvals!
 >>
 >>
 >> Regards,
 >>
 >> --=20
 >> Marcelo Araujo (__)
 >> araujo@FreeBSD.org \\\'',)
 >> http://www.FreeBSD.org \/ \ ^
 >> Power To Server. .\. /_)
 I need to register this solicitation in GNATS BACKLOG, done.
 
 --=20
 Marcelo Araujo            (__)
 araujo@FreeBSD.org     \\\'',)
